Spacious Accommodation: The guest house features spacious rooms with private bathrooms, parquet floors, and free WiFi. Each room includes a work desk, TV, and comfortable seating area.
Modern Amenities: Amenities include a fireplace, barbecue, tea and coffee maker, hairdryer, outdoor furniture, and a fully equipped kitchen with a refrigerator, microwave, and toaster.
Nearby Attractions: Melkbosstrand Beach is just a few steps away, while Cape Town International Airport is 40 km distant. Other attractions include Blaauwberg Nature Reserve (7 km) and Table Mountain (37 km).
